name: Whoopie Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Mix all ingredients together until well blended.
3. Drop by teaspoonful on an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake for 7 - 8 minutes, then remove from the oven and place on a wire rack to cool.
5. Prepare the cream filling by blending all the ingredients together.
6. Coat one devil dog with the cream and top with another devil dog.
